nodes.name: Webhook: Receive URL
nodes.notes: Miya POSTs {"url": "https://youtube.com/..."} here to start the pipeline

nodes.name: Execute: Run Pipeline
nodes.notes: Runs yt-dlp download → Whisper transcribe → Claude clip selection → FFmpeg cut. Takes 5–20 min depending on video length.

nodes.name: Execute: Find Manifest
nodes.notes: Finds the most recently created manifest JSON from the pipeline run

nodes.name: Read: Clip Binary
nodes.notes: Reads each .mp4 clip from disk. Runs once per clip (n8n loops automatically over all items).

nodes.name: Drive: Upload Clip
nodes.notes: Uploads each clip to the 'Video Clips' folder in Google Drive. Set REPLACE_WITH_DRIVE_FOLDER_ID in setup.

nodes.name: OpenClaw: Notify Mauriel
nodes.notes: Sends clip summary to Mauriel via OpenClaw CLI. Session key: agent:main:telegram:direct:5775812070
